title: OpenAI Raises $122B
summary: OpenAI has secured $122 billion in new funding to drive global expansion of frontier AI. This investment will boost next-generation compute and meet growing demand for AI tools like ChatGPT and Codex.
body:
OpenAI has announced a significant funding round, raising $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI development. This substantial investment will be used to expand the global reach of its frontier AI technologies, enhancing its capabilities and accessibility worldwide. 

 The funding will also be allocated towards investing in next-generation compute, a critical component for advancing AI research and development. This move is expected to significantly improve the performance and efficiency of OpenAI's models, including ChatGPT and Codex, which have seen considerable adoption and interest. 

 As OpenAI continues to push the boundaries of AI, this new funding is poised to play a pivotal role in meeting the growing demand for its AI solutions, particularly in the enterprise sector. With this investment, OpenAI is well-positioned to further innovate and lead in the AI landscape, addressing complex challenges and exploring new opportunities for AI applications.
twitterThread: 🚀 Just announced: OpenAI raises $122 BILLION in new funding! 🤯
Here's why this matters: Next-generation compute is key to unlocking AI's full potential. OpenAI is leading the charge.
The wild part? This funding will accelerate global expansion of frontier AI, making it more accessible than ever.
Let that sink in: $122 billion is one of the largest funding rounds in history. This changes everything for AI research and development.
This changes everything for the future of AI. What's next for OpenAI and the AI landscape?
standaloneTweet: OpenAI just raised $122 billion to accelerate the next phase of AI! This game-changing funding will drive global expansion, next-gen compute, and meet soaring demand for ChatGPT and more. https://ainformed.dev/articles/openai-raises-122b
